dungeon: Epic Bosses (Epic-enemy TIER — a system, not one dungeon)
map: N/A — montage of one player soloing EPIC versions of bosses in their own arenas across several dungeons (lava/fire room, purple spider arena, rainbow Sprite-World tiles, blue/white creature arenas). 'x2 Speed' overlay on clips.

bosses.name: Epic (god-tier) — implied from death notifications: Kraken, Hydra, Cyclops, Phoenix, Golem, Beholder/Medusa

drops: loot bags opened (specific items not legible at this resolution)
mechanics: EPIC = buffed version of a normal boss/god with its own harder arena; soloable; drops better loot. Confirms the wiki's Epic Gods roster (Brain/Medusa/Ent/Septavius/White Demon/Beholder/Djinn) + Epic bosses (Archdemon etc.). Feeds the Phase-D1 Epic Enemies system.
uncertain: Exact per-boss stats/patterns + drop item names not legible (480p, x2 speed). Boss NAMES confirmed via chat death-notifications.
confidence: MEDIUM — boss roster confirmed from chat (Epic Archdemon, Epic Septavius, Epic Djinn + implied epic gods). Useful for the Epic Enemies system, not a dungeon map.
